thoughts: Today is Sunday, April 5, 2026.
According to the DAYS logic: Sunday = DAYS=3 (covers Friday + Saturday).
I need to run the gchat_reader.py script with --days 3.
The script will take 5-15 minutes. I'll start it and then monitor it every 30 seconds up to 10 times.
After completion, I'll send a success notification via notify.py.
If it fails, I'll send an error notification.
kvps.headline: Starting GChat sync for Sunday (DAYS=3)
